heading: Service of process
label: 170311 Service of process
text: The corporation shall comply with the law on service of process of each State in which it is incorporated and each State in which it carries on activities.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)17031136:3604., , .Oct. 7, 1985Pub. L. 99–119, § 499 Stat. 499The words “in furtherance of its corporate purposes” are omitted as unnecessary.
